{{Infobox character
| name = Hound
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|techniques of a Hound}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Hound]]}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Abidan]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|messenger}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Skysworn (novel)|Skysworn]]
}}

''See also: [[Hound Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[The Hounds]] constitute the [[First Division]] of [[Makiel]]'s forces, serving as a specialized group within a larger hierarchy that includes other divisions like the [[Foxes]] and [[Wolves]]. Their primary function involves monitoring and managing [[Fate]] across various [[Iterations]]. Highly skilled members of this division possess the ability to observe the destinies of existence, identify overlapping fates, and investigate potential violations. They can also manipulate causality to steer reality away from chaos or nonexistence, effectively bending chance and guiding the decisions of [[Judges]] toward specific outcomes. While they can glimpse future possibilities, their foresight is limited to a window of approximately thirty years within [[Cradle]]. [[Makiel]] is a prominent figure identified as a Hound, characterized by his ability to see possibilities that others miss and his significant responsibility in deciding the future. He is depicted as a rat-like man with dark, beady eyes and a thin beard, though he can manifest in full battle armor wielding a two-handed [[sword]]. The division's symbol is a blue, three-headed dog measuring one hundred meters in diameter. Despite their immense power to influence the [[Way]] and [[Fate]], the [[Hounds]] are currently described as being stretched thin due to an ongoing greater war.}}

== Skysworn ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|The will of the [[Hound]] bends [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[The Hound]] is a white-armored, rat-faced messenger.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c21">''Wintersteel'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Reaper ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Makiel]] is the [[Hound]] and wears full battle armor.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c15">''Reaper'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Hound]] directs the [[Judges]] and guides [[Fate]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] has the vision of the [[Hound]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c26">''Reaper'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Dreadgod ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Hound]] is an entity that saw a possibility others did not.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c20">''Dreadgod'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Waybound ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[The Hound]] has observational authority.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c6">''Waybound'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The techniques of a [[Hound]] can provide access to several more senses.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|A [[Hound]] is a role or position within the [[Abidan]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c12">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
